#### AccountConfig



AccountConfig configures a local (non-SSO) user account (argocd-cm: accounts.*).
The built-in admin user is also represented here (legacy admin.enabled).



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` _string_ | Name is the local account username (max 32 characters in Argo CD),<br />e.g. "admin", "ci-bot". Legacy: suffix of accounts.<name>. | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `enabled` _boolean_ | Enabled enables or disables the account (argocd-cm: accounts.<name>.enabled<br />or admin.enabled for the built-in admin user). Accounts are enabled by<br />default when the accounts.<name> entry exists.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm accounts. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `capabilities` _string array_ | Capabilities is the set of actions the account may perform: "login" (UI)<br />and/or "apiKey" (generate tokens). Legacy: comma-separated value of<br />accounts.<name> (e.g. "apiKey, login"). Entries must be unique.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm accounts.<name> capabilities; replaces the whole collection. | items:Enum: [login apiKey] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |

#### ArgoCDConfigurationSpec



ArgoCDConfigurationSpec holds Argo CD configuration.

Fields remain optional so unset (absent) is distinguishable from empty and
gradual CRD adoption is possible. Where set, values are validated maximally
in the CRD (CEL / OpenAPI) rather than only in application code.

Naming conventions:
  - *URL — absolute URL; CEL-validated (usually http/https)
  - *Glob — value may contain glob wildcards (*, ?)
  - *Regex — regular expression string (Go RE2 / regexp); distinguished from Glob
  - *Expr — expression language string (e.g. deep-link "if" condition)
  - *Template — Go text/template (or similar); not validated as a plain URL
  - *Lua — string whose value is a Lua script (not a YAML/document wrapper)
  - *Size — byte/payload size as resource.Quantity (not unit-suffixed ints)
  - tlsEnabled — whether TLS is used (server or client); not "insecure"/"plaintext"
  - insecureSkipVerify — skip cert verification; not inverted "strictTLS"
  - *Enabled — past-tense suffix for feature toggles (e.g. tlsEnabled, profileEnabled);
    not enable*/disable* prefixes and not *Disabled double-negatives.
    Bare "enabled" OK on a feature settings object. Invert mapping when the legacy key
    uses the opposite polarity (disable.*, *.insecure, *.plaintext).
  - *ParallelismLimit — concurrency caps (bare parallelismLimit when the parent is the
    limited component; otherwise subjectParallelismLimit). Not concurrent*Max.

Secrets that Argo owns end-to-end use SecretKeySelector. $string interpolation
is reserved for opaque/external structures (Dex connector config) or intentional
partial string insertion.



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfiguration](#argocdconfiguration)

| --- | --- | --- |

| `applicationSet` _[ApplicationSetConfig](#applicationsetconfig)_ | ApplicationSet holds ApplicationSet controller settings.<br />Migration: component group; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

#### BackoffConfig



BackoffConfig is exponential backoff used for retries (mirrors Application sync
retry backoff naming: duration / factor / maxDuration).
Use this shape for any retry/backoff settings group rather than ad-hoc
timeout/cap/baseBackoff field names.



_Appears in:_
- [ClientRetryConfig](#clientretryconfig)
- [SelfHealConfig](#selfhealconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `duration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | Duration is the initial / base wait before the first retry.<br />Self-heal: controller.self.heal.backoff.timeout.seconds (default 2s).<br />K8s client: *.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff (default 100ms; doubles each<br />retry up to an internal 10s cap — only Duration is used for k8s client).<br />Application sync: backoff.duration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `factor` _integer_ | Factor multiplies the wait after each failed attempt.<br />Self-heal: controller.self.heal.backoff.factor (default 3).<br />Unused for current k8s client retry (reserved for shape consistency). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `maxDuration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | MaxDuration is the maximum wait between retries.<br />Self-heal: controller.self.heal.backoff.cap.seconds (default 300s).<br />Unused for current k8s client retry (hard-capped at 10s in code). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ClientRetryConfig



ClientRetryConfig is retry policy for a Kubernetes API client.
Organizational subgroup: max attempts and backoff migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [K8sClientConfig](#k8sclientconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `max` _integer_ | Max is the maximum number of client retries<br />(cmd-params: *.k8sclient.retry.max). Default 0 — only the initial attempt.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8sclient.retry.max key. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `backoff` _[BackoffConfig](#backoffconfig)_ | Backoff is the wait between retries. Only Duration is used by current<br />Argo CD cmd-params (*.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff; default 100ms);<br />Factor/MaxDuration are reserved for a consistent BackoffConfig shape.<br />Delay doubles each retry and is hard-capped at 10s in Argo CD.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over the component *.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff key via backoff.duration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `batchEventsProcessing` _boolean_ | BatchEventsProcessing enables batching of cluster cache events<br />(cmd-params: controller.cluster.cache.batch.events.processing).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.cluster.cache.batch.events.processing. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `eventsProcessingInterval` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | EventsProcessingInterval is how often batched events are processed<br />(cmd-params: controller.cluster.cache.events.processing.interval).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.cluster.cache.events.processing.interval. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ControllerConfig



ControllerConfig holds application-controller runtime and product settings.



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfigurationSpec](#argocdconfigurationspec)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `reconciliation` _[ReconciliationConfig](#reconciliationconfig)_ | Reconciliation holds periodic app reconciliation / git poll timing<br />(argocd-cm: timeout.reconciliation, timeout.reconciliation.jitter).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm timeout.reconciliation* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `sharding` _[ControllerShardingConfig](#controllershardingconfig)_ | Sharding holds controller shard balancing settings<br />(cmd-params: controller.sharding.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.sharding.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `processors` _[ControllerProcessorsConfig](#controllerprocessorsconfig)_ | Processors holds parallel worker counts for status, operations, and hydration.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.*.processors as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `log` _[LogConfig](#logconfig)_ | Log holds controller log format and level (cmd-params: controller.log.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.log.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `metrics` _[ControllerMetricsConfig](#controllermetricsconfig)_ | Metrics configures which labels/conditions are exported as Prometheus metrics.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `selfHeal` _[SelfHealConfig](#selfhealconfig)_ | SelfHeal configures automated self-heal attempt timing and backoff.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.self.heal.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `cache` _[ControllerCacheConfig](#controllercacheconfig)_ | Cache holds controller Redis cache TTLs (cmd-params: controller.app.state.cache.expiration,<br />controller.default.cache.expiration).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.*.cache.expiration as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `resourceHealthPersist` _boolean_ | ResourceHealthPersist stores per-resource health in the Application CR<br />(cmd-params: controller.resource.health.persist). Increases CR update load.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.resource.health.persist. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kubectlParallelismLimit` _integer_ | KubectlParallelismLimit caps concurrent kubectl fork/execs<br />(cmd-params: controller.kubectl.parallelism.limit). Zero means unlimited.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.kubectl.parallelism.limit. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `diff` _[ControllerDiffConfig](#controllerdiffconfig)_ | Diff holds server-side diff and global ignore-differences settings.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `profileEnabled` _boolean_ | ProfileEnabled enables pprof profiling endpoints<br />(cmd-params: controller.profile.enabled).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.profile.enabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `profilerFilePath` _string_ | ProfilerFilePath enables the Go profiler and writes profiles to this path<br />(env: ARGOCD_ENABLE_PROFILER_FILE_PATH).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over env ARGOCD_ENABLE_PROFILER_FILE_PATH. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled` _boolean_ | GRPCTXTServiceConfigEnabled enables gRPC TXT service config<br />(cmd-params: controller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `repoErrorGracePeriod` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | RepoErrorGracePeriod is how long the controller tolerates repo-server errors<br />before failing an operation (cmd-params: controller.repo.error.grace.period.seconds).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.repo.error.grace.period.seconds. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `clusterCache` _[ControllerClusterCacheConfig](#controllerclustercacheconfig)_ | ClusterCache tunes cluster cache event batching<br />(cmd-params: controller.cluster.cache.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.cluster.cache.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `k8sClient` _[K8sClientConfig](#k8sclientconfig)_ | K8sClient holds Kubernetes client tuning for the application controller<br />(cmd-params: controller.k8s.* / controller.k8sclient.*).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `resource` _[ResourceConfig](#resourceconfig)_ | Resource holds watch filters and per-GVK customizations.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `instanceLabelKey` _string_ | InstanceLabelKey is the label key used to track managed resources<br />(argocd-cm: application.instanceLabelKey). Default is app.kubernetes.io/instance.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm application.instanceLabelKey. | Pattern: `^$\|^([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?/)?([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `resourceTrackingMethod` _string_ | ResourceTrackingMethod selects how ownership is recorded on managed resources:<br />"label", "annotation", or "annotation+label"<br />(argocd-cm: application.resourceTrackingMethod).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm application.resourceTrackingMethod. | Enum: [annotation label annotation+label] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `allowedNodeLabelKeys` _string array_ | AllowedNodeLabelKeys are node label keys shown in the application pod view<br />(argocd-cm: application.allowedNodeLabels).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm application.allowedNodeLabels; replaces the whole collection. | items:Pattern: `^([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?/)?([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `sync` _[ApplicationSyncConfig](#applicationsyncconfig)_ | Sync holds sync impersonation policy and sync timing.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `globalProjects` _[GlobalProjectConfig](#globalprojectconfig) array_ | GlobalProjects defines global AppProjects applied to matching projects by<br />label selector (argocd-cm: globalProjects).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm globalProjects; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `sourceHydrator` _[SourceHydratorConfig](#sourcehydratorconfig)_ | SourceHydrator configures the beta manifest source hydrator.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled` _boolean_ | IgnoreResourceUpdatesEnabled is the master switch for ignoreResourceUpdates<br />rules that skip reconciles on watched updates<br />(argocd-cm: resource.ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled). Default true in Argo CD —<br />when false, all resource updates are applied to the cluster cache.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `ignoreNormalizerJQTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | IgnoreNormalizerJQTimeout is the max time to evaluate a JQPathExpression<br />ignore-differences rule (cmd-params: controller.ignore.normalizer.jq.timeout).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.ignore.normalizer.jq.timeout. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

#### ControllerProcessorsConfig



ControllerProcessorsConfig holds parallel worker counts for the application controller.



_Appears in:_
- [ControllerConfig](#controllerconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `status` _integer_ | Status is the number of parallel application status processors<br />(cmd-params: controller.status.processors).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.status.processors. | Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `operation` _integer_ | Operation is the number of parallel sync/operation processors<br />(cmd-params: controller.operation.processors).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.operation.processors. | Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `hydration` _integer_ | Hydration is the number of manifest hydration workers when the source hydrator is enabled<br />(cmd-params: controller.hydration.processors).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.hydration.processors. | Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |

_Appears in:_

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |

#### DeepLink



DeepLink is one custom UI deep link. URLTemplate and ConditionExpr may use
Go templates / expr-lang expressions evaluated against application/project/resource context.



_Appears in:_
- [DeepLinksConfig](#deeplinksconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `urlTemplate` _string_ | URLTemplate is the link target and may include Go text/template expressions<br />(e.g. \{\{.app.spec.destination.namespace\}\}); not CEL-validated as a plain URL.<br />Legacy: <location>.links[].url. | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `title` _string_ | Title is the link text / tag shown in the UI (legacy: title). | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `description` _string_ | Description is optional explanatory text for the link (legacy: description). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `iconClass` _string_ | IconClass is an optional Font Awesome CSS class for dropdown display<br />(legacy: icon.class). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `conditionExpr` _string_ | ConditionExpr is an expr-lang expression; the link is shown only when true<br />(legacy: if). Omitted = always show. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### DeepLinksConfig



DeepLinksConfig holds custom deep links for application, project, and resource views
(argocd-cm: application.links / project.links / resource.links).
See docs/operator-manual/deep_links.md in argo-cd.
Organizational subgroup: each link collection migrates independently.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `application` _[DeepLink](#deeplink) array_ | Application links appear in the application summary tab<br />(argocd-cm: application.links). Template context: app/application, cluster.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm application.links; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `project` _[DeepLink](#deeplink) array_ | Project links appear in the project tab (argocd-cm: project.links).<br />Template context: project.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm project.links; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `resource` _[DeepLink](#deeplink) array_ | Resource links appear in the resource summary tab (argocd-cm: resource.links).<br />Template context: resource, application, cluster, project. Secret data fields<br />are redacted but other fields remain accessible for templating.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.links; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### DexConfig



DexConfig is the Dex SSO configuration (argocd-cm: dex.config).
Connectors use a typed envelope; per-connector config stays opaque and may
contain $string secret interpolation (Dex-owned schema).



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `connectors` _[DexConnector](#dexconnector) array_ | Connectors is the list of Dex identity connectors (GitHub, OIDC, SAML, LDAP, …).<br />See https://dexidp.io/docs/connectors/. Migration: composite child of dex.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `staticClients` _[RawExtension](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#rawextension-runtime-pkg) array_ | StaticClients are additional Dex static OAuth clients for reuse with other<br />services (e.g. Argo Workflows). Argo CD also injects its own static clients<br />when Dex is enabled. Migration: composite child of dex.config (staticClients). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `extra` _[RawExtension](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#rawextension-runtime-pkg)_ | Extra holds any additional top-level Dex config keys not modeled above<br />(e.g. issuer, storage). Opaque; preserved as-is from dex.config.<br />Migration: composite child of dex.config (unmodeled root keys). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### DexConnectionConfig



DexConnectionConfig is how the API server reaches Dex (cmd-params: server.dex.server*).



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` _string_ | Address is the Dex server host:port (cmd-params: server.dex.server).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.dex.server. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled controls TLS when connecting to Dex (cmd-params: server.dex.server.plaintext —<br />inverted: plaintext=true means tlsEnabled=false).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.dex.server.plaintext (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `insecureSkipVerify` _boolean_ | InsecureSkipVerify skips verification of the Dex TLS certificate<br />(cmd-params: server.dex.server.strict.tls — inverted: strict.tls=true means skip=false).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.dex.server.strict.tls (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### DexConnector



DexConnector is one Dex identity connector entry (dex.config connectors[]).



_Appears in:_
- [DexConfig](#dexconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `type` _string_ | Type is the Dex connector type (e.g. "github", "oidc", "saml", "ldap").<br />Migration: composite child of dex.config (connectors[].type). | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `id` _string_ | ID is the connector's unique identifier within Dex (login routing / internal use).<br />Migration: composite child of dex.config (connectors[].id). | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `name` _string_ | Name is the human-readable connector name shown on the login page.<br />Migration: composite child of dex.config (connectors[].name). | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `config` _[RawExtension](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#rawextension-runtime-pkg)_ | Config is opaque Dex connector configuration (client IDs, org filters, etc.).<br />$string / $secret:key refs are allowed. Schema is owned by Dex, not Argo CD.<br />When set from Go, Raw must be JSON bytes.<br />Migration: composite child of dex.config (connectors[].config). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### DexServerConfig



DexServerConfig holds Dex server process runtime settings (cmd-params: dexserver.*).



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfigurationSpec](#argocdconfigurationspec)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `log` _[LogConfig](#logconfig)_ | Log holds Dex server log format and level (cmd-params: dexserver.log.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm dexserver.log.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled controls whether the Dex server serves TLS (cmd-params: dexserver.disable.tls —<br />inverted: disable.tls=true means tlsEnabled=false). TLS is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm dexserver.disable.tls (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `connectorFailureContinue` _boolean_ | ConnectorFailureContinue continues serving when a connector fails to initialize<br />(cmd-params: dexserver.connector.failure.continue).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm dexserver.connector.failure.continue. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| Field | Description | Validation |

ExecConfig configures the UI pod terminal (exec) feature.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `enabled` _boolean_ | Enabled turns on pod exec from the UI (argocd-cm: exec.enabled).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm exec.enabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `shells` _string array_ | Shells are preferred shells tried in order for exec sessions<br />(argocd-cm: exec.shells), e.g. bash, sh, powershell, cmd.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm exec.shells; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ExtensionCluster



ExtensionCluster selects a destination cluster for an extension backend.



_Appears in:_
- [ExtensionService](#extensionservice)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `serverURL` _string_ | ServerURL is the cluster API server URL to match against Application<br />destination.server (legacy: cluster.server). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `name` _string_ | Name is the Argo CD cluster name to match against Application<br />destination.name (legacy: cluster.name). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ExtensionConfig



ExtensionConfig configures one UI proxy extension (argocd-cm: extension.config).
Requires server.proxyExtensionEnabled (cmd-params: server.enable.proxy.extension).
Transport fields are hoisted onto the extension (legacy CM still nests them under backend).



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` _string_ | Name is the extension identifier; registers the proxy route at<br /><argocd-host>/api/v1/extensions/<name> and is used in RBAC.<br />Legacy: extension.config extensions[].name. | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `services` _[ExtensionService](#extensionservice) array_ | Services are upstream backends the proxy may forward to (optionally<br />filtered by Application destination cluster).<br />Legacy: extension.config extensions[].backend.services. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `connectionTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | ConnectionTimeout is the max dial time to the upstream extension server<br />(legacy: backend.connectionTimeout / backend.transport.connectionTimeout; default 2s). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `keepAlive` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | KeepAlive is the HTTP keep-alive probe interval for upstream connections<br />(legacy: backend.keepAlive; default 15s). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `idleConnectionTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | IdleConnectionTimeout is how long idle upstream connections are kept<br />(legacy: backend.idleConnectionTimeout; default 60s). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `maxIdleConnections` _integer_ | MaxIdleConnections is the max idle connections in the upstream pool<br />(legacy: backend.maxIdleConnections; default 30). | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ExtensionHeader



ExtensionHeader is an HTTP header injected into extension proxy requests.



_Appears in:_
- [ExtensionService](#extensionservice)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` _string_ | Name is the HTTP header name (legacy: headers[].name). | MinLength: 1 <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `value` _string_ | Value is the header value; may include $secret.key interpolation<br />(legacy: headers[].value). | Required: \{\} <br /> |


#### ExtensionService



ExtensionService is one upstream URL for an extension.



_Appears in:_
- [ExtensionConfig](#extensionconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `url` _string_ | URL is the upstream extension service base URL (mandatory).<br />Legacy: extension.config ...services[].url. | Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `cluster` _[ExtensionCluster](#extensioncluster)_ | Cluster optionally restricts this backend to Applications whose destination<br />matches. Required when multiple services are configured; ignored when only<br />one service exists. Legacy: ...services[].cluster. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `headers` _[ExtensionHeader](#extensionheader) array_ | Headers are extra HTTP headers injected on outgoing proxy requests<br />(override same-named incoming headers; reserved names are ignored).<br />Values may use $secret.key for argocd-secret lookup.<br />Legacy: ...services[].headers. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### FilteredResource



FilteredResource selects resources by API group, kind, and/or cluster for
resource.exclusions / resource.inclusions. Omitting a field matches all values
for that dimension. events.k8s.io and metrics.k8s.io are excluded by default
even when this list is empty.



_Appears in:_
- [ResourceConfig](#resourceconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `apiGroups` _string array_ | APIGroups are API groups to match ("" for core, "*" for any).<br />Omitted = match all groups. Legacy: resource.exclusions/inclusions apiGroups. | items:Pattern: `^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?([.][a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*\|[*])?$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kinds` _string array_ | Kinds are Kubernetes Kind names to match ("*" for any).<br />Omitted = match all kinds. Legacy: resource.exclusions/inclusions kinds. | items:Pattern: `^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*\|[*])$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `clusters` _string array_ | Clusters are cluster server URLs or names this filter applies to<br />(supports globs such as "*.local"). Omitted = all clusters.<br />Legacy: resource.exclusions/inclusions clusters. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### GlobalPreservedKeysConfig



GlobalPreservedKeysConfig holds keys preserved on ApplicationSet-generated Applications.



_Appears in:_
- [ApplicationSetConfig](#applicationsetconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `annotationKeys` _string array_ | AnnotationKeys are annotation keys preserved on generated Applications<br />(cmd-params: applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.annotations).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.annotations; replaces the whole collection. | items:Pattern: `^([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?/)?([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `labelKeys` _string array_ | LabelKeys are label keys preserved on generated Applications<br />(cmd-params: applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.labels).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.labels; replaces the whole collection. | items:Pattern: `^([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?/)?([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### GlobalProjectConfig



GlobalProjectConfig applies a global AppProject's defaults to matching projects
(argocd-cm: globalProjects). Inherited settings include namespace/cluster resource
black/whitelists, syncWindows, sourceRepos, destinations, and
destinationServiceAccounts.



_Appears in:_
- [ControllerConfig](#controllerconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `projectName` _string_ | ProjectName is the name of the global AppProject to apply<br />(legacy: globalProjects[].projectName). | Pattern: `^$\|^[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `labelSelector` _[LabelSelector](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#labelselector-v1-meta)_ | LabelSelector selects which AppProjects receive this global project's settings<br />(In, NotIn, Exists, DoesNotExist). Legacy: globalProjects[].labelSelector. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

GoogleAnalyticsConfig holds optional Google Analytics settings.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `trackingID` _string_ | TrackingID is the Google Analytics tracking / measurement ID<br />(argocd-cm: ga.trackingid).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ga.trackingid. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `anonymizeUsers` _boolean_ | AnonymizeUsers anonymizes user identifiers sent to Google Analytics<br />(argocd-cm: ga.anonymizeusers).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ga.anonymizeusers. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### HelmConfig



HelmConfig holds Helm tool settings (argocd-cm: helm.* and cmd-params: reposerver.helm.*).
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [RepoServerConfig](#reposerverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `enabled` _boolean_ | Enabled enables Helm as a manifest source tool (argocd-cm: helm.enable).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm helm.enable. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `valuesFileSchemes` _string array_ | ValuesFileSchemes are URI schemes allowed for remote Helm values files<br />(argocd-cm: helm.valuesFileSchemes), e.g. "https", "http".<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm helm.valuesFileSchemes; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `userAgent` _string_ | UserAgent is the User-Agent header for Helm registry/HTTP requests<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.helm.user.agent).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.helm.user.agent. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `manifest` _[HelmManifestConfig](#helmmanifestconfig)_ | Manifest holds Helm chart extracted-size limits (cmd-params: reposerver.helm.manifest.max.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.helm.manifest.max.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### HelmManifestConfig



HelmManifestConfig holds Helm chart extracted-size limits.



_Appears in:_
- [HelmConfig](#helmconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `maxExtractedSize` _[Quantity](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#quantity-resource-api)_ | MaxExtractedSize caps extracted Helm chart size<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `maxExtractedSizeEnabled` _boolean_ | MaxExtractedSizeEnabled controls the extracted size limit<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.disable.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size —<br />inverted: disable...=true means enabled=false). Limit is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.disable.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

Values may be absolute http(s) URLs or paths —<br />not CEL-validated as absolute URLs.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm help.download.*; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

#### K8sClientConfig



K8sClientConfig holds Kubernetes API client tuning shared by components.
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [ApplicationSetConfig](#applicationsetconfig)
- [ControllerConfig](#controllerconfig)
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `qps` _string_ | QPS is the client queries-per-second limit (cmd-params: *.k8s.client.qps).<br />Stored as a decimal string because CRDs discourage float types; may be<br />fractional (e.g. "50" or "12.5").<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.client.qps key. | Pattern: `^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `burst` _integer_ | Burst is the client burst size (cmd-params: *.k8s.client.burst).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.client.burst key. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `maxIdleConnections` _integer_ | MaxIdleConnections is the max idle connections in the HTTP pool<br />(cmd-params: *.k8s.client.max.idle.connections).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.client.max.idle.connections key. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tcp` _[K8sClientTCPConfig](#k8sclienttcpconfig)_ | TCP holds TCP dial, keep-alive, and idle timeout settings (cmd-params: *.k8s.tcp.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.tcp.* keys as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsHandshakeTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | TLSHandshakeTimeout is the TLS handshake timeout<br />(cmd-params: *.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout key. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `retry` _[ClientRetryConfig](#clientretryconfig)_ | Retry holds Kubernetes client retry limits and backoff<br />(cmd-params: *.k8sclient.retry.*).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### K8sClientTCPConfig



K8sClientTCPConfig holds TCP tuning for a Kubernetes API client.



_Appears in:_
- [K8sClientConfig](#k8sclientconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `timeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | Timeout is the TCP dial timeout (cmd-params: *.k8s.tcp.timeout).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.tcp.timeout key. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `keepAlive` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | KeepAlive is the TCP keep-alive period (cmd-params: *.k8s.tcp.keepalive).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.tcp.keepalive key. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `idleTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | IdleTimeout is the idle connection timeout (cmd-params: *.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component *.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout key. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

KnownTypeField names a field with a known Go/Kubernetes type for diffing.



_Appears in:_

| Field | Description | Validation |

| `field` _string_ | Field is the JSON path within the resource needing typed normalization<br />(e.g. "spec.template.spec"). Legacy: knownTypeFields[].field. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `type` _string_ | Type is the known Kubernetes type name for normalization<br />(e.g. "core/v1/PodSpec", "core/Quantity").<br />See util/argo/normalizers/diffing_known_types.txt in argo-cd. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

_Appears in:_

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `enabled` _boolean_ | Enabled enables Kustomize as a manifest source tool (argocd-cm: kustomize.enable).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm kustomize.enable. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `buildOptions` _string_ | BuildOptions are default options passed to `kustomize build`<br />(argocd-cm: kustomize.buildOptions).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm kustomize.buildOptions. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `versions` _[KustomizeVersion](#kustomizeversion) array_ | Versions lists alternate Kustomize binaries and per-version build options<br />(argocd-cm: kustomize.path.* / kustomize.buildOptions.*).<br />Applications select a version via source.kustomize.version. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### KustomizeVersion



KustomizeVersion names an alternate Kustomize binary selectable via
Application source.kustomize.version.



_Appears in:_
- [KustomizeConfig](#kustomizeconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |

| `path` _string_ | Path is the filesystem path to the kustomize binary for this version<br />(argocd-cm: kustomize.path.<name>; preferred over deprecated<br />kustomize.version.<name>). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `buildOptions` _string_ | BuildOptions are extra `kustomize build` flags specific to this version<br />(argocd-cm: kustomize.buildOptions.<name>). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

- [RepoServerConfig](#reposerverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |

| `metricsAddress` _string_ | MetricsAddress is the metrics listen host (cmd-params: *.metrics.listen.address).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the component's argocd-cmd-params-cm *.metrics.listen.address key. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `level` _string_ | Level is the log level (cmd-params: *.log.level).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over the corresponding argocd-cmd-params-cm *.log.level key. | Enum: [debug info warn error] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |

Empty means RFC3339.<br />See https://pkg.go.dev/time#pkg-constants.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm log.format.timestamp. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

#### NotificationsConfig



NotificationsConfig holds notifications-controller settings.



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfigurationSpec](#argocdconfigurationspec)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `log` _[LogConfig](#logconfig)_ | Log holds notifications-controller log format and level<br />(cmd-params: notificationscontroller.log.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm notificationscontroller.log.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `processorsCount` _integer_ | ProcessorsCount is the number of notification processors<br />(cmd-params: notificationscontroller.processors.count).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm notificationscontroller.processors.count. | Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `selfServiceEnabled` _boolean_ | SelfServiceEnabled enables notifications self-service<br />(cmd-params: notificationscontroller.selfservice.enabled).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm notificationscontroller.selfservice.enabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled controls TLS when connecting to the repo-server<br />(cmd-params: notificationscontroller.repo.server.plaintext —<br />inverted: plaintext=true means tlsEnabled=false).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm notificationscontroller.repo.server.plaintext (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `repoServerClient` _[MTLSCertConfig](#mtlscertconfig)_ | RepoServerClient holds mTLS cert paths when connecting to the repo-server<br />(cmd-params: notificationscontroller.repo.server.*). Named distinctly from<br />spec.repoServer (the repo-server itself) to avoid overloaded keys.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `appLabelSelector` _string_ | AppLabelSelector restricts which Applications the notifications controller watches<br />(flag: --app-label-selector).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over notifications --app-label-selector. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `repoServerAddress` _string_ | RepoServerAddress is the repo-server host:port<br />(flag: --argocd-repo-server).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over notifications --argocd-repo-server. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `repoServerStrictTLS` _boolean_ | RepoServerStrictTLS requires a verified TLS connection to the repo-server<br />(flag: --argocd-repo-server-strict-tls).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over notifications --argocd-repo-server-strict-tls. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `configMapName` _string_ | ConfigMapName is the notifications ConfigMap name (flag: --config-map-name).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over notifications --config-map-name. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `secretName` _string_ | SecretName is the notifications Secret name (flag: --secret-name).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over notifications --secret-name. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `metricsPort` _integer_ | MetricsPort is the metrics listen port (flag: --metrics-port).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over notifications --metrics-port. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Maximum: 65535 <br />Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `maxExtractedSizeEnabled` _boolean_ | MaxExtractedSizeEnabled controls the extracted size limit<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.disable.oci.manifest.max.extracted.size —<br />inverted: disable...=true means enabled=false). Limit is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.disable.oci.manifest.max.extracted.size (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### OIDCClaim



OIDCClaim describes a requested ID token claim (OIDC Claims Parameter).



_Appears in:_
- [OIDCConfig](#oidcconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `essential` _boolean_ | Essential marks the claim as essential in the OIDC claims request<br />(oidc.config requestedIDTokenClaims.<claim>.essential).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `value` _string_ | Value requests a single specific claim value<br />(oidc.config requestedIDTokenClaims.<claim>.value).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `values` _string array_ | Values requests that the claim match one of several allowed values<br />(oidc.config requestedIDTokenClaims.<claim>.values).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### OIDCConfig



OIDCConfig is direct OIDC SSO configuration (argocd-cm: oidc.config).
When non-nil it replaces oidc.config wholesale.
See docs/operator-manual/user-management/ in argo-cd.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` _string_ | Name is the provider display name shown on the SSO login button<br />(oidc.config name). Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `issuerURL` _string_ | IssuerURL is the OIDC issuer URL that must expose<br />.well-known/openid-configuration (oidc.config issuer).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `clientID` _string_ | ClientID is the OAuth 2.0 client ID registered with the IdP for the Argo CD<br />server callback (/auth/callback) (oidc.config clientID).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `clientSecretRef` _[SecretKeySelector](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#secretkeyselector-v1-core)_ | ClientSecretRef references the OIDC client secret in a Kubernetes Secret.<br />Raw secrets and $string refs are not accepted here — use a SecretKeySelector.<br />Legacy oidc.config clientSecret ($secret:key in argocd-cm) must become an<br />explicit secret ref. Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `cliClientID` _string_ | CLIClientID is a separate OAuth client ID for the Argo CD CLI (localhost<br />callback). When omitted, the CLI reuses ClientID (oidc.config cliClientID).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `userInfo` _[OIDCUserInfoConfig](#oidcuserinfoconfig)_ | UserInfo holds UserInfo endpoint settings for group membership lookup when<br />groups are absent from the ID token. Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `requestedScopes` _string array_ | RequestedScopes are OIDC scopes requested at login (oidc.config requestedScopes).<br />When omitted, Argo CD defaults to ["openid", "profile", "email", "groups"].<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `requestedIDTokenClaims` _object (keys:string, values:[OIDCClaim](#oidcclaim))_ | RequestedIDTokenClaims requests additional claims via the OIDC Claims<br />Parameter on the ID token (e.g. groups) (oidc.config requestedIDTokenClaims).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `logoutURL` _string_ | LogoutURL is an optional IdP logout URL. May include \{\{token\}\} and<br />\{\{logoutRedirectURL\}\} placeholders (oidc.config logoutURL).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `rootCA` _string_ | RootCA is a PEM-encoded root CA used to verify the OIDC provider's TLS<br />certificate when it is not signed by a well-known CA (oidc.config rootCA).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `pkceAuthenticationEnabled` _boolean_ | PKCEAuthenticationEnabled enables PKCE for the authorization code flow<br />(oidc.config enablePKCEAuthentication). Default false.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `domainHint` _string_ | DomainHint is sent to the IdP as the domain_hint authorization parameter<br />(common with Microsoft Entra ID) (oidc.config domainHint). Empty = not sent.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `azure` _[AzureOIDCConfig](#azureoidcconfig)_ | Azure holds Azure AD / Entra ID–specific OIDC options (workload identity,<br />group overage). Migration: composite child of oidc.config (azure). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `refreshTokenThreshold` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | RefreshTokenThreshold refreshes the ID token this long before expiry using<br />the refresh token (oidc.config refreshTokenThreshold). Default 0s refreshes<br />only after expiry; must be shorter than token lifetime.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `allowedAudiences` _string array_ | AllowedAudiences are accepted JWT aud values for tokens presented to Argo CD<br />(oidc.config allowedAudiences). When omitted/empty, defaults to<br />[clientID, cliClientID].<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience` _boolean_ | SkipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience accepts tokens that omit the aud<br />claim when true (oidc.config skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience).<br />Default false for direct OIDC (Argo CD ≥ 2.6).<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `insecureSkipVerify` _boolean_ | InsecureSkipVerify skips TLS certificate verification when talking to the<br />OIDC provider or bundled Dex (argocd-cm: oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify).<br />This is a separate legacy key from oidc.config; nested under oidc for<br />discoverability. Pointer so it can migrate independently of the composite blob.<br />Default false. Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### OIDCUserInfoConfig



OIDCUserInfoConfig holds UserInfo endpoint settings for OIDC group lookup.



_Appears in:_
- [OIDCConfig](#oidcconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `groupsEnabled` _boolean_ | GroupsEnabled fetches group membership from the UserInfo endpoint when groups<br />are absent from the ID token (oidc.config enableUserInfoGroups). Default false.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `baseURL` _string_ | BaseURL overrides the UserInfo endpoint base URL when it differs from the issuer<br />(oidc.config userInfoBaseURL). Empty uses the issuer URL.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `path` _string_ | Path is the UserInfo path appended to BaseURL or the issuer URL<br />(oidc.config userInfoPath). Must be set (with GroupsEnabled) to enable<br />UserInfo lookup; there is no hardcoded default in Argo CD.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `cacheExpiration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | CacheExpiration is how long cached UserInfo group results are kept<br />(oidc.config userInfoCacheExpiration). Zero falls back to ID token lifetime.<br />Migration: composite child of oidc.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### OTLPConfig



OTLPConfig holds OpenTelemetry collector settings shared across components.



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfigurationSpec](#argocdconfigurationspec)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` _string_ | Address is the collector host:port (cmd-params: otlp.address), e.g. "otel:4317".<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm otlp.address. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled enables TLS when exporting to the collector (cmd-params: otlp.insecure —<br />inverted: insecure=true means TLSEnabled=false). Default legacy behavior is insecure.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm otlp.insecure (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `headers` _object (keys:string, values:string)_ | Headers are extra headers sent to the collector (cmd-params: otlp.headers),<br />historically "key=value,key2=value2".<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm otlp.headers; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `attrs` _object (keys:string, values:string)_ | Attrs are resource attributes attached to spans (cmd-params: otlp.attrs),<br />historically "key:value,key2:value2".<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm otlp.attrs; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `sampleRatio` _string_ | SampleRatio is the trace sampling ratio between 0.0 and 1.0<br />(cmd-params: otlp.sample.ratio). Stored as a decimal string because CRDs<br />discourage float types (cross-language JSON number issues).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm otlp.sample.ratio. | Pattern: `^(0(\.[0-9]+)?\|1(\.0+)?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |

_Appears in:_

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |

#### RBACConfig



RBACConfig holds authorization policy (argocd-rbac-cm).
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `default` _string_ | Default is the default role assigned when no policy matches<br />(argocd-rbac-cm: policy.default), e.g. "role:readonly".<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-rbac-cm policy.default. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `scopes` _string array_ | Scopes are OIDC scopes/claims examined for group membership<br />(argocd-rbac-cm: scopes). Default is typically [groups].<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-rbac-cm scopes; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `matchMode` _string_ | MatchMode selects the Casbin matcher: "glob" (default) or "regex"<br />(argocd-rbac-cm: policy.matchMode).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-rbac-cm policy.matchMode. | Enum: [glob regex] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `policyCSV` _string_ | PolicyCSV is the main Casbin policy.csv contents (roles and bindings).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-rbac-cm policy.csv. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `policyOverlays` _[RBACPolicyOverlay](#rbacpolicyoverlay) array_ | PolicyOverlays are additional named policy.csv fragments concatenated<br />after the main policy (argocd-rbac-cm: policy.<name>.csv).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-rbac-cm policy.<name>.csv; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `applicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled` _boolean_ | ApplicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled controls inheriting project roles<br />for fine-grained application RBAC<br />(argocd-cm: server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance —<br />inverted: disable...=true means enabled=false). Inheritance is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### RBACPolicyOverlay



RBACPolicyOverlay is a named extra policy.csv fragment concatenated after the

_Appears in:_
- [RBACConfig](#rbacconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |

| `csv` _string_ | CSV is the Casbin CSV policy content for this overlay (roles, bindings,<br />and resource rules). Maps to argocd-rbac-cm policy.<name>.csv. | Required: \{\} <br /> |

Also used as the repo-server git revision cache TTL.<br />Zero disables polling.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm timeout.reconciliation. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `hardTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | HardTimeout is the hard resync interval that forces reconciliation even when<br />the repo has not changed (argocd-cm: timeout.hard.reconciliation).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm timeout.hard.reconciliation. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `jitter` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | Jitter is random additional delay added to reconciliation (argocd-cm: timeout.reconciliation.jitter).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm timeout.reconciliation.jitter. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `db` _integer_ | DB is the Redis database number (cmd-params: redis.db).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm redis.db. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `keyPrefix` _string_ | KeyPrefix is prepended to Redis keys (cmd-params: redis.key.prefix).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm redis.key.prefix. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled controls TLS when connecting to the repo-server<br />(cmd-params: *.repo.server.plaintext — inverted: plaintext=true means tlsEnabled=false).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm *.repo.server.plaintext (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `insecureSkipVerify` _boolean_ | InsecureSkipVerify skips verification of the repo-server TLS certificate<br />(cmd-params: *.repo.server.strict.tls — inverted: strict.tls=true means skip=false).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm *.repo.server.strict.tls (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `mtls` _[MTLSCertConfig](#mtlscertconfig)_ | MTLS holds mTLS certificate paths for connecting to the repo-server.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm *.repo.server.*.cert.path as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### RepoServerConfig



RepoServerConfig holds repo-server address, client, and manifest-tool settings.



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfigurationSpec](#argocdconfigurationspec)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` _string_ | Address is the repo-server host:port (cmd-params: repo.server). Not a full URL.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm repo.server. | MinLength: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `client` _[RepoServerClientConfig](#reposerverclientconfig)_ | Client holds shared TLS/timeout settings used by components connecting to<br />the repo-server (controller.repo.server.* / server.repo.server.*).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `parallelismLimit` _integer_ | ParallelismLimit caps concurrent manifest generation requests<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.parallelism.limit). Zero means unlimited.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.parallelism.limit. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `listen` _[ListenConfig](#listenconfig)_ | Listen holds repo-server and metrics listen addresses<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.listen.address, reposerver.metrics.listen.address).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.listen.address /<br />reposerver.metrics.listen.address as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled controls whether the repo-server serves TLS (cmd-params: reposerver.disable.tls —<br />inverted: disable.tls=true means tlsEnabled=false). TLS is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.disable.tls (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `git` _[RepoServerGitConfig](#reposervergitconfig)_ | Git holds git submodule, timeout, and built-in config settings.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.enable.git.submodule /<br />reposerver.git.* / reposerver.enable.builtin.git.config as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `allowOOBSymlinks` _boolean_ | AllowOOBSymlinks allows out-of-bounds symlinks in repos<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.allow.oob.symlinks).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.allow.oob.symlinks. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `includeHiddenDirectories` _boolean_ | IncludeHiddenDirectories includes hidden directories when generating manifests<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.include.hidden.directories).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.include.hidden.directories. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `cache` _[RepoServerCacheConfig](#reposervercacheconfig)_ | Cache holds repo-server Redis cache TTLs (cmd-params: reposerver.default.cache.expiration,<br />reposerver.repo.cache.expiration).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.*.cache.expiration as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize` _[Quantity](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#quantity-resource-api)_ | MaxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize caps combined directory manifests size<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.max.combined.directory.manifests.size).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.max.combined.directory.manifests.size. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `streamedManifest` _[StreamedManifestConfig](#streamedmanifestconfig)_ | StreamedManifest caps streamed manifest tar and extracted sizes<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `plugin` _[RepoServerPluginConfig](#reposerverpluginconfig)_ | Plugin holds config management plugin settings.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.plugin.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `profileEnabled` _boolean_ | ProfileEnabled enables pprof profiling endpoints<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.profile.enabled).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.profile.enabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled` _boolean_ | GRPCTXTServiceConfigEnabled enables gRPC TXT service config<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.grpc.enable.txt.service.config).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.grpc.enable.txt.service.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `clientCAPath` _string_ | ClientCAPath is the path to a client CA for mTLS<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.client.ca.path).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.client.ca.path. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tls` _[TLSVersionConfig](#tlsversionconfig)_ | TLS holds repo-server TLS cipher/version settings (cmd-params: reposerver.tls.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.tls.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `oci` _[RepoServerOCIConfig](#reposerverociconfig)_ | OCI holds OCI registry size and media-type limits (cmd-params: reposerver.oci.*).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `grpcMaxSize` _[Quantity](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#quantity-resource-api)_ | GRPCMaxSize caps gRPC response message size for the repo-server<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.grpc.max.size; historically an integer megabyte count).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.grpc.max.size. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `revisionCacheLockTimeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | RevisionCacheLockTimeout is how long to wait for the revision-cache lock<br />(cmd-params: reposerver.revision.cache.lock.timeout).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.revision.cache.lock.timeout. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `jsonnet` _[JsonnetConfig](#jsonnetconfig)_ | Jsonnet holds Jsonnet tool enablement (argocd-cm: jsonnet.enable).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm jsonnet.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `log` _[LogConfig](#logconfig)_ | Log holds repo-server log format and level (cmd-params: reposerver.log.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm reposerver.log.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kustomize` _[KustomizeConfig](#kustomizeconfig)_ | Kustomize holds Kustomize enablement, build options, and version binaries.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `helm` _[HelmConfig](#helmconfig)_ | Helm holds Helm enablement, values-file schemes, and repo-server Helm limits.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

#### ResourceActionsCustomization



ResourceActionsCustomization is a per-GVK custom-actions override: discovery plus
named action definitions (argocd-cm: resource.customizations.actions.<group_kind>).



_Appears in:_
- [ResourceConfig](#resourceconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `group` _string_ | Group is the API group ("" for core, "*" for wildcard). | Pattern: `^$\|^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?([.][a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*\|[*])$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kind` _string_ | Kind is the Kubernetes Kind ("*" for wildcard). Required. | Pattern: `^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*\|[*])$` <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `discoveryLua` _string_ | DiscoveryLua is a Lua script that returns which custom actions are available<br />(and optional disabled flags) for the resource (legacy: discovery.lua). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `mergeBuiltinActions` _boolean_ | MergeBuiltinActions merges custom actions with built-in ones instead of<br />replacing them (Argo CD ≥ 2.13; legacy: mergeBuiltinActions). Default false. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `definitions` _[ResourceActionDefinition](#resourceactiondefinition) array_ | Definitions are named custom resource actions (legacy: definitions[] in the<br />resource.customizations.actions.<group_kind> YAML blob). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
