Listed by concern so you edit health without scanning mixed GVK rows.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.customizations.health.*<br />and resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.*; replaces those collections. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `actions` _[ResourceActionsCustomization](#resourceactionscustomization) array_ | Actions is per-GVK custom resource actions: discovery script plus named definitions<br />(argocd-cm: resource.customizations.actions.*). Discovery and definitions stay grouped<br />because they form one actions blob per GVK in Argo CD.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.customizations.actions.*;<br />replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `ignoreDifferences` _[ResourceIgnoreCustomization](#resourceignorecustomization) array_ | IgnoreDifferences is per-GVK sync-diff ignore rules<br />(argocd-cm: resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.*).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.*;<br />replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `ignoreResourceUpdates` _[ResourceIgnoreCustomization](#resourceignorecustomization) array_ | IgnoreResourceUpdates is per-GVK rules for fields whose changes should not trigger<br />reconcile (argocd-cm: resource.customizations.ignoreResourceUpdates.*).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.customizations.ignoreResourceUpdates.*;<br />replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `knownTypeFields` _[ResourceKnownTypesCustomization](#resourceknowntypescustomization) array_ | KnownTypeFields is per-GVK typed-field declarations for structured diff<br />(argocd-cm: resource.customizations.knownTypeFields.*).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.customizations.knownTypeFields.*;<br />replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `respectRBAC` _string_ | RespectRBAC limits watched resources to those the controller can list:<br />empty (off), "normal", or "strict" (argocd-cm: resource.respectRBAC).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.respectRBAC. | Enum: [;normal strict] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `sensitiveMaskAnnotationKeys` _string array_ | SensitiveMaskAnnotationKeys are Secret annotation keys masked in the UI/CLI<br />(argocd-cm: resource.sensitive.mask.annotations).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.sensitive.mask.annotations; replaces the whole collection. | items:Pattern: `^([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?/)?([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `customLabelKeys` _string array_ | CustomLabelKeys are resource label keys shown in the resource node info panel<br />(argocd-cm: resource.customLabels).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.customLabels; replaces the whole collection. | items:Pattern: `^([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?/)?([A-Za-z0-9]([-A-Za-z0-9_.]*[A-Za-z0-9])?)$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `eventLabels` _[EventLabelsConfig](#eventlabelsconfig)_ | EventLabels controls which Application/AppProject label keys are copied onto<br />emitted Kubernetes events (argocd-cm: resource.includeEventLabelKeys /<br />resource.excludeEventLabelKeys).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm resource.*EventLabelKeys as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ResourceHealthCustomization



ResourceHealthCustomization is a per-GVK health Lua override
(argocd-cm: resource.customizations.health.<group_kind> /
resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.<group_kind>).



_Appears in:_
- [ResourceConfig](#resourceconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `group` _string_ | Group is the API group ("" for core, "*" for wildcard). | Pattern: `^$\|^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?([.][a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*\|[*])$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kind` _string_ | Kind is the Kubernetes Kind ("*" for wildcard). Required.<br />Wildcards are only valid in the unified resource.customizations YAML blob,<br />not in split ConfigMap keys. | Pattern: `^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*\|[*])$` <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `healthLua` _string_ | HealthLua is a Lua script that overrides built-in health assessment for this GVK.<br />Must return a table with status (Healthy/Progressing/Degraded/…) and optional message.<br />When absent, default health is Progressing until a status is produced.<br />Legacy: resource.customizations.health.<group_kind> or health.lua in the unified blob. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `useOpenLibs` _boolean_ | UseOpenLibs enables standard Lua libraries for health and action scripts for this GVK<br />(disabled by default for security). Legacy: resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.<group_kind><br />or health.lua.useOpenLibs. Default false. Lives on the health entry because Argo CD's<br />monolithic blob nests it under health.lua; the flag still applies to action scripts too. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ResourceIgnoreCustomization



ResourceIgnoreCustomization is a per-GVK ignoreDifferences or ignoreResourceUpdates
override (argocd-cm: resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.<group_kind> /
ignoreResourceUpdates.<group_kind>).



_Appears in:_
- [ResourceConfig](#resourceconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `group` _string_ | Group is the API group ("" for core, "*" for wildcard). | Pattern: `^$\|^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?([.][a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*\|[*])$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kind` _string_ | Kind is the Kubernetes Kind ("*" for wildcard). Required. | Pattern: `^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*\|[*])$` <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `jsonPointers` _string array_ | JSONPointers are RFC 6901 JSON Pointers to ignore (e.g. /spec/replicas). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `jqPathExpressions` _string array_ | JQPathExpressions are jq expressions selecting fields to ignore. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `managedFieldsManagers` _string array_ | ManagedFieldsManagers ignores fields owned by these managedFields managers. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ResourceKnownTypesCustomization



ResourceKnownTypesCustomization is a per-GVK knownTypeFields override
(argocd-cm: resource.customizations.knownTypeFields.<group_kind>).



_Appears in:_
- [ResourceConfig](#resourceconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `group` _string_ | Group is the API group ("" for core, "*" for wildcard). | Pattern: `^$\|^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?([.][a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*\|[*])$` <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `kind` _string_ | Kind is the Kubernetes Kind ("*" for wildcard). Required. | Pattern: `^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*\|[*])$` <br />Required: \{\} <br /> |
| `fields` _[KnownTypeField](#knowntypefield) array_ | Fields declares typed fields used for structured diff normalization<br />(e.g. treating a nested object as core/v1/PodSpec). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### SelfHealConfig



SelfHealConfig holds controller self-heal timing (cmd-params: controller.self.heal.*).



_Appears in:_
- [ControllerConfig](#controllerconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `timeout` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | Timeout is the minimum interval between self-heal attempts<br />(cmd-params: controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds). Zero means no minimum<br />(Argo CD default).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `cooldown` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | Cooldown maps to controller.self.heal.backoff.cooldown.seconds.<br />Deprecated in Argo CD: the CLI flag is marked deprecated and has no effect.<br />Kept for ConfigMap round-trip compatibility only.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.self.heal.backoff.cooldown.seconds. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `backoff` _[BackoffConfig](#backoffconfig)_ | Backoff configures exponential backoff between self-heal attempts<br />(cmd-params: controller.self.heal.backoff.*). Defaults in Argo CD:<br />duration 2s, factor 3, maxDuration 300s.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm controller.self.heal.backoff.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ServerCacheConfig



ServerCacheConfig holds API server cache TTLs and sizes.
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `appStateExpiration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | AppStateExpiration is the app state cache TTL (cmd-params: server.app.state.cache.expiration).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.app.state.cache.expiration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `connectionStatusExpiration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | ConnectionStatusExpiration is the connection status cache TTL<br />(cmd-params: server.connection.status.cache.expiration).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.connection.status.cache.expiration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `defaultExpiration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | DefaultExpiration is the default Redis cache TTL (cmd-params: server.default.cache.expiration).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.default.cache.expiration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `oidcExpiration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | OIDCExpiration is the OIDC cache TTL (cmd-params: server.oidc.cache.expiration).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.oidc.cache.expiration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `globCacheSize` _integer_ | GlobCacheSize is the glob matcher cache size (cmd-params: server.glob.cache.size).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.glob.cache.size. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### ServerConfig



ServerConfig holds API server, UI, and auth-facing settings.



_Appears in:_
- [ArgoCDConfigurationSpec](#argocdconfigurationspec)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `urls` _string array_ | URLs are externally facing base URLs for this Argo CD instance<br />(argocd-cm: url + additionalUrls). The first entry is the primary URL used for<br />SSO redirects (argocd-cm: url); any further entries are additional SSO-capable<br />base URLs (argocd-cm: additionalUrls).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm url and additionalUrls as a pair; replaces both. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tlsEnabled` _boolean_ | TLSEnabled controls whether the API server serves TLS (cmd-params: server.insecure —<br />inverted: insecure=true means tlsEnabled=false). TLS is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.insecure (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `log` _[LogConfig](#logconfig)_ | Log holds API server log format and level (cmd-params: server.log.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.log.* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `baseHref` _string_ | BaseHref is the path Argo CD is hosted under with a reverse proxy that<br />cannot strip prefixes (cmd-params: server.basehref). Example: "/argo-cd".<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.basehref. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `rootPath` _string_ | RootPath is the path Argo CD is hosted under when the reverse proxy strips<br />the prefix (cmd-params: server.rootpath). Example: "/argo-cd".<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.rootpath. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `staticAssetsPath` _string_ | StaticAssetsPath is the directory of UI static assets<br />(cmd-params: server.staticassets).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.staticassets. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `listen` _[ServerListenConfig](#serverlistenconfig)_ | Listen holds API server listen host/port and metrics listen host/port<br />(cmd-params: server.listen.address, server.metrics.listen.address;<br />flags: --port, --metrics-port).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `authEnabled` _boolean_ | AuthEnabled controls API authentication (cmd-params: server.disable.auth —<br />inverted: disable.auth=true means authEnabled=false). Auth is on by default.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.disable.auth (inverted). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `compression` _string_ | Compression is the HTTP response compression algorithm<br />(cmd-params: server.enable.gzip): "disabled" or "gzip". Gzip is on by default in Argo CD.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.enable.gzip<br />(true maps to gzip, false to disabled). | Enum: [disabled gzip] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `proxyExtensionEnabled` _boolean_ | ProxyExtensionEnabled enables UI proxy extensions<br />(cmd-params: server.enable.proxy.extension).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.enable.proxy.extension. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `syncReplaceAllowed` _boolean_ | SyncReplaceAllowed allows clients to request sync with replace<br />(cmd-params: server.sync.replace.allowed).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.sync.replace.allowed. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `xFrameOptions` _string_ | XFrameOptions sets the X-Frame-Options HTTP header<br />(cmd-params: server.x.frame.options).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.x.frame.options. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `apiContentTypes` _string array_ | APIContentTypes is the Content-Type allowlist for API requests<br />(cmd-params: server.api.content.types).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.api.content.types; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `contentSecurityPolicy` _string_ | ContentSecurityPolicy sets the Content-Security-Policy HTTP header<br />(cmd-params: server.content.security.policy).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.content.security.policy. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `httpCookieMaxNumber` _integer_ | HTTPCookieMaxNumber caps the number of cookies the API server will accept<br />(cmd-params: server.http.cookie.maxnumber).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.http.cookie.maxnumber. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `applicationTreeShardSize` _integer_ | ApplicationTreeShardSize is the max number of resources stored in one<br />application-tree cache shard (env: ARGOCD_APPLICATION_TREE_SHARD_SIZE).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over env ARGOCD_APPLICATION_TREE_SHARD_SIZE. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Maximum: 1000 <br />Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `profileEnabled` _boolean_ | ProfileEnabled enables pprof profiling endpoints (cmd-params: server.profile.enabled).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.profile.enabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled` _boolean_ | GRPCTXTServiceConfigEnabled enables gRPC TXT service config<br />(cmd-params: server.grpc.enable.txt.service.config).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.grpc.enable.txt.service.config. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `dexConnection` _[DexConnectionConfig](#dexconnectionconfig)_ | DexConnection holds how the API server connects to Dex<br />(cmd-params: server.dex.server*). Named distinctly from spec.dexServer<br />(Dex process runtime) to avoid overloaded keys.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.dex.server* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `cache` _[ServerCacheConfig](#servercacheconfig)_ | Cache holds API server cache TTLs and sizes (cmd-params: server.*.cache.*).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `tls` _[TLSVersionConfig](#tlsversionconfig)_ | TLS holds API server TLS cipher/version settings (cmd-params: server.tls.*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.tls.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `k8sClient` _[K8sClientConfig](#k8sclientconfig)_ | K8sClient holds Kubernetes client tuning for the API server<br />(cmd-params: server.k8s.* / server.k8sclient.*).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `logs` _[ServerLogsConfig](#serverlogsconfig)_ | Logs holds UI pod-log viewing settings (argocd-cm: server.maxPodLogsToRender).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm server.maxPodLogsToRender as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `dex` _[DexConfig](#dexconfig)_ | Dex replaces dex.config wholesale when non-nil.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm dex.config as a whole, including all child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `oidc` _[OIDCConfig](#oidcconfig)_ | OIDC replaces oidc.config wholesale when non-nil (direct OIDC, alternative to Dex).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm oidc.config as a whole, including all child fields.<br />Note: InsecureSkipVerify maps to a separate argocd-cm key (oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify),<br />not the oidc.config blob — it is nested here for discoverability. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `rbac` _[RBACConfig](#rbacconfig)_ | RBAC holds authorization policy from argocd-rbac-cm.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `ui` _[UIConfig](#uiconfig)_ | UI holds web UI customization (banner, CSS, login button text).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `accounts` _[AccountConfig](#accountconfig) array_ | Accounts configures local (non-SSO) user accounts and their capabilities.<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm accounts.* / admin.enabled; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `extensions` _[ExtensionConfig](#extensionconfig) array_ | Extensions configures UI proxy extensions (argocd-cm: extension.config).<br />Migration: if present, takes precedence over argocd-cm extension.config; replaces the whole collection. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `deepLinks` _[DeepLinksConfig](#deeplinksconfig)_ | DeepLinks configures custom deep links shown in application, project, and<br />resource views (argocd-cm: application.links / project.links / resource.links).<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `help` _[HelpConfig](#helpconfig)_ | Help configures the UI help/chat panel and CLI download links.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `users` _[UsersConfig](#usersconfig)_ | Users holds anonymous access, session duration, and password policy.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `googleAnalytics` _[GoogleAnalyticsConfig](#googleanalyticsconfig)_ | GoogleAnalytics holds optional Google Analytics tracking settings.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm ga.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `webhook` _[WebhookConfig](#webhookconfig)_ | Webhook holds SCM webhook payload, jitter, and server webhook worker settings.<br />Migration: organizational subgroup; no legacy key — see child fields. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `exec` _[ExecConfig](#execconfig)_ | Exec configures the UI pod terminal (exec) feature.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm exec.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `statusBadge` _[StatusBadgeConfig](#statusbadgeconfig)_ | StatusBadge configures application/project status badge URLs.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm statusbadge.* as a group (children apply from the CR; no merge with legacy siblings under that family). | Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| `metricsAddress` _string_ | MetricsAddress is the metrics listen host (cmd-params: server.metrics.listen.address).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.metrics.listen.address. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `metricsPort` _integer_ | MetricsPort is the metrics listen port (flag: --metrics-port).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over server --metrics-port. Does not round-trip through ConfigMaps. | Maximum: 65535 <br />Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |

| --- | --- | --- |
| `minVersion` _string_ | MinVersion is the minimum accepted TLS version: "1.0", "1.1", "1.2", or "1.3"<br />(cmd-params: *.tls.minversion). Default "1.2". | Enum: [1.0 1.1 1.2 1.3] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `maxVersion` _string_ | MaxVersion is the maximum accepted TLS version: "1.0", "1.1", "1.2", or "1.3"<br />(cmd-params: *.tls.maxversion). Default "1.3". | Enum: [1.0 1.1 1.2 1.3] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `ciphers` _string array_ | Ciphers lists allowed TLS cipher suite names<br />(cmd-params: *.tls.ciphers). Default typically<br />TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384; use "list" with the Argo CD CLI<br />to enumerate available ciphers. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### UIBannerConfig



UIBannerConfig holds UI banner display settings.



_Appears in:_
- [UIConfig](#uiconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `content` _string_ | Content is the banner message shown in the UI (argocd-cm: ui.bannercontent).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.bannercontent. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `url` _string_ | URL is an optional link target for the banner text (argocd-cm: ui.bannerurl).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.bannerurl. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `permanent` _boolean_ | Permanent makes the banner non-dismissible (argocd-cm: ui.bannerpermanent).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.bannerpermanent. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `position` _string_ | Position is where the banner appears: top, bottom, or both (argocd-cm: ui.bannerposition).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.bannerposition. | Enum: [top bottom both] <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### UIConfig



UIConfig holds web UI customization (argocd-cm: ui.*).
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `cssURL` _string_ | CSSURL is a local path (relative to /shared/app) or remote http(s) URL for custom CSS<br />(argocd-cm: ui.cssurl). Not CEL-validated as an absolute URL — relative paths are valid.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.cssurl. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `banner` _[UIBannerConfig](#uibannerconfig)_ | Banner holds the UI banner message, link, and display options (argocd-cm: ui.banner*).<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.banner* as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `loginButtonText` _string_ | LoginButtonText overrides the SSO login button label<br />(argocd-cm: ui.loginButtonText).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm ui.loginButtonText. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### UsersConfig



UsersConfig holds anonymous access, session, and password policy settings.
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently.



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `anonymousEnabled` _boolean_ | AnonymousEnabled allows unauthenticated access with the default RBAC role<br />(argocd-cm: users.anonymous.enabled).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm users.anonymous.enabled. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `sessionDuration` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | SessionDuration is how long user sessions / tokens remain valid<br />(argocd-cm: users.session.duration). Default is typically 24h.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm users.session.duration. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `passwordRegex` _string_ | PasswordRegex is a Go regexp that local account passwords must match<br />(argocd-cm: passwordPattern).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm passwordPattern. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### WebhookConfig



WebhookConfig holds SCM webhook payload limits, refresh jitter, and server workers.
Organizational subgroup: children migrate independently (argocd-cm + cmd-params).



_Appears in:_
- [ServerConfig](#serverconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `maxPayloadSize` _[Quantity](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#quantity-resource-api)_ | MaxPayloadSize is the maximum webhook HTTP body size (argocd-cm:<br />webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB). Use a Kubernetes resource.Quantity (e.g. "50M").<br />Legacy CM values in megabytes map to/from decimal megabytes.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `refresh` _[WebhookRefreshConfig](#webhookrefreshconfig)_ | Refresh holds webhook-triggered refresh jitter and worker settings.<br />Migration: if non-nil, takes precedence over argocd-cm webhook.refresh.* and<br />argocd-cmd-params-cm server.webhook.refresh.workers as a group. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `parallelismLimit` _integer_ | ParallelismLimit caps concurrent webhook processing on the API server<br />(cmd-params: server.webhook.parallelism.limit).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.webhook.parallelism.limit. | Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |


#### WebhookRefreshConfig



WebhookRefreshConfig holds webhook refresh jitter and worker settings.



_Appears in:_
- [WebhookConfig](#webhookconfig)

| Field | Description | Validation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `jitter` _[Duration](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#duration-v1-meta)_ | Jitter is the maximum random delay before webhook-triggered app refreshes<br />(argocd-cm: webhook.refresh.jitter), spreading load.<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm webhook.refresh.jitter. | Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `jitterThreshold` _integer_ | JitterThreshold is the minimum number of affected apps before jitter is applied<br />(argocd-cm: webhook.refresh.jitter.threshold).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cm webhook.refresh.jitter.threshold. | Minimum: 0 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
| `workers` _integer_ | Workers is the number of workers handling webhook refreshes<br />(cmd-params: server.webhook.refresh.workers).<br />Migration: if set, takes precedence over argocd-cmd-params-cm server.webhook.refresh.workers. | Minimum: 1 <br />Optional: \{\} <br /> |
